features.name: inline arithmetic expression as vector bit-select index causing underflow
features.description: Code should include a vector bit-select where the index is an inline arithmetic expression (e.g. narrow_reg - constant) that can underflow, to expose whether the simulator evaluates the expression in a wider context producing out-of-bounds X instead of wrapping

features.name: narrow register subtraction underflow wrap-around semantics
features.description: Code should include a subtraction on a narrow-width register (e.g. reg [2:0]) where the result underflows, verifying that modular wrap-around is preserved and the result stays within the declared bit-width

features.name: explicit intermediate wire truncation before array index use
features.description: Code should include an explicit intermediate wire with a declared bit-width used to truncate an arithmetic expression before the result is applied as an array or vector bit-select index, ensuring the index stays in-bounds through forced truncation
